features: LEMON-LIME FLAVOR: Wake your taste buds with a fresh snap of Lemon-Lime. This flavor is all about recharging your day with a sharp, citrusy burst that’s as refreshing as a day at the beach. It’s the perfect hydrating pick-me-up that’s purely natural, with zero artificial additives or sugars.

Unmatched 1220mg electrolytes per serving for superior hydration and peak performance, far surpassing other brands. Our blend supports optimal cellular hydration, muscle function, and recovery. Perfect for health-conscious individuals and those with specific dietary needs.
Supports muscle recovery and reduces fatigue with a potent and balanced mix of sodium, potassium, calcium, and magnesium. Our formula helps you recover and build stronger muscles post-workout.

Hand-harvested French Grey Sea Salt provides a rich source of 83 trace minerals, enhancing hydration at the cellular level. Our proprietary blend is scientifically backed and lab-tested for safety and efficacy.

MORE SALT, MORE SUPPORT: Studies show that high-functioning bodies need higher levels of salt intake. The more you sweat the more you need SALT! This is why we formulated our perfect all-in-one electrolyte drink with sel gris known for its complex, mineral-rich flavor.
